## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Device Info
- Device: (e.g., Pixel 7)
- Android Version: (e.g., Android 14)
- ZenSMS Version: (check in Settings → About)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Additional Context
Anything else relevant.
